subject: English
chapter: JEFP109 – The Book That Saved the Earth

key_points: The play is written by Claire Boiko
It is set in the twenty-fifth century
The story is narrated by a Historian
The twentieth century is called the ‘Era of the Book’
Think-Tank is the arrogant ruler of Mars
The Martians plan to invade Earth
They land in a public library on Earth
Books save the Earth from invasion
characters: Captain Omega – Leader of the Martian mission
themes: Books are more powerful than weapons
exam_tips: Remember the futuristic setting of the play
Do not confuse Think-Tank and Noodle
Highlight how books save the Earth
Mention humour and satire in answers
Focus on the message that knowledge is power
